connection.configure: Use CLI/MCP for stored subscription data
connection.setupDescription: This page is a placeholder in the MVP. Shikin stores subscription data for CLI/MCP analytics, but browser create/edit/list flows are not wired yet.
connection.step1: Use CLI/MCP tools such as list-subscriptions and get-subscription-spending for stored subscription data.
connection.step2: Continue tracking subscription charges as recurring transactions or normal expenses in the browser app.
connection.step3: A browser subscription management UI remains planned future scope.

empty.title: No subscriptions found
empty.description: Stored subscriptions are not listed in the browser UI yet.
